hooks.command: bash -c 'if [[ "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" == *.py ]]; then cd backend && uv run ruff check --fix "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" 2>/dev/null || true; fi'
hooks.description: Auto-fix Python lint issues after edits

hooks.command: bash -c 'if [[ "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" == *.ts || "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" == *.tsx ]]; then cd frontend && bunx biome check --fix "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" 2>/dev/null || true; fi'
hooks.description: Auto-fix TypeScript lint issues after edits

hooks.command: bash -c 'if [[ "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" == *.py ]]; then cd backend && uv run ruff check --fix "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" 2>/dev/null || true; fi'
hooks.description: Auto-fix Python lint issues after writes

hooks.command: bash -c 'if [[ "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" == *.ts || "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" == *.tsx ]]; then cd frontend && bunx biome check --fix "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" 2>/dev/null || true; fi'
hooks.description: Auto-fix TypeScript lint issues after writes

hooks.command: bash -c 'CMD=$(jq -r .tool_input.command 2>/dev/null); echo "$CMD" | grep -qE "^git commit" || exit 0; if git diff --cached --name-only | grep -qE "\.py$"; then cd backend && uv run ruff check $(git diff --cached --name-only --relative | grep "\.py$" | tr "\n" " "); fi'
hooks.description: Lint staged Python files with Ruff before git commit

hooks.command: bash -c 'CMD=$(jq -r .tool_input.command 2>/dev/null); echo "$CMD" | grep -qE "^git commit" || exit 0; if git diff --cached --name-only | grep -qE "\.(ts|tsx)$"; then cd frontend && bunx biome check $(git diff --cached --name-only --relative | grep -E "\.(ts|tsx)$" | tr "\n" " "); fi'
hooks.description: Lint staged TypeScript files with Biome before git commit

hooks.command: bash -c 'CMD=$(jq -r .tool_input.command 2>/dev/null); echo "$CMD" | grep -qE "^git commit" || exit 0; git diff --cached -U0 | grep -iE "(api[_-]?key|secret|password|token|credential)\s*[=:]\s*[\x27\"][^\x27\"]{8,}" && echo "BLOCKED: Possible secret detected in staged changes" && exit 1 || exit 0'
